steps.title: Identify the structural signal
steps.content: The passage claims that “a younger generation of musicians has embraced the stylistic experimentation of Keyboard Fantasies.” The underlined sentence immediately follows to develop this point.

steps.title: Determine the sentence's function
steps.content: The underlined sentence provides specific examples — Blood Orange and Moses Sumney, plus “other contemporary recording artists” — of younger musicians influenced by the album, directly supporting the preceding claim. Choice A mistakes the sentence as urging musicians to adopt the sound, choice B references criticism never mentioned in the passage, and choice D invents a contrast where the relationship is one of influence. That matches choice C — C is correct.
